reference: I got hit by a car while on a bicycle and the only thing that was affected was my left leg. At the time, my leg looked like the muscle next to my shin had been dented, but I could still walk on it without any problem. Now my leg has no pain; however, a small patch near the shin feels numb and devoid of sensation.
